title: ITEC 2026 — Beijing Chaoyang International Talent Entrepreneurship Conference
prize: ¥50M+ total prize pool (86 awards, max ¥5M Special Prize)
desc: 14th edition. 10 industry tracks + 8 special tracks. Open to global entrepreneurs. Prize + Investment + Loan triple-engine support.
highlights: ¥50M+ total prize pool with 86 award slots
10 industry tracks: Smart Hardware, Embodied AI, Aerospace, General AI, Metaverse, Digital Healthcare, Industrial AI, Data Elements, Digital Culture, Future Industries
8 special tracks including robotics, photonics, and disruptive tech
Policy matching, landing services, office space included
Registration open until August 31, 2026
titleCN: 第十四届朝阳国际人才创业大会（ITEC 2026）全球创业赛

title: China (Shenzhen) Innovation & Entrepreneurship International Competition (10th Edition)
desc: 10th edition. 12 overseas division stations across US, Europe, Asia-Pacific. One of China's most prestigious international innovation competitions.
highlights: 12 overseas stations: Boston, London, Paris, Toronto, Sydney, Stockholm, Amsterdam, Zurich, Barcelona, Seoul, Singapore + more
Grand Prize: ¥1.5M (¥500K immediate + ¥1M landing fund)
¥5B venture capital pool from 50+ investment institutions
Up to 24 months free workspace across 434 startup spaces in Shenzhen
No nationality restrictions; must not have registered entity in Shenzhen
titleCN: 中国深圳创新创业大赛国际赛（第十届）

title: 12th China Overseas Scholars Entrepreneurship Competition & International Talent Sci-Tech Contest
prize: Cash prizes (1 First / 3 Second / 6 Third / 10 Excellence) + landing support
desc: Jointly organized by China Overseas Scholars Pioneer Park. New International Talent Sci-Tech Contest track for 2026. 5,500+ returnee projects since 2015.
highlights: New International Talent Sci-Tech Contest track for non-returnee international teams
Three sectors: Biomedicine & Bio-manufacturing, IC & Advanced Manufacturing, High-Performance Medical Devices
Finals in Suzhou, Jiangsu (late July)
Haichuang China Talent Tour for project-industry matchmaking
Full-chain support: competition → mentoring → landing → industrialization
titleCN: 第十二届中国海外学子创业大赛暨国际人才科技创新创业大赛

title: 3rd Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area Doctoral & Postdoctoral Innovation Competition
desc: 10 tracks across innovation and entrepreneurship. Open to global PhDs and postdocs. Finals at Songshan Lake, Dongguan. Unveiling track open until Aug 31.
highlights: 10 sectors: AI, Semiconductors, Robotics, New Energy, New Materials, Biomedicine, TCM, Modern Agriculture, Marine Research, Modern Services
Innovation track: ¥250K + ¥250K upon company registration in Guangdong
Entrepreneurship track: ¥500K Grand Prize (one-time)
Open to Hong Kong, Macao, and overseas PhDs/postdocs starting businesses in Guangdong
Innovation/Entrepreneurship tracks deadline: July 15 | Unveiling track deadline: Aug 31
titleCN: 第三届粤港澳大湾区博士博士后创新创业大赛

title: HICOOL 2026 Global Entrepreneurship Competition
desc: 6th edition. One of China's largest startup competitions. 34,000+ projects from 167 countries over 6 years. Four rounds: Online Assessment → Regional → Semi-Final → Final.
highlights: 200 award slots with ¥110.8M total prize pool
12 tracks: AI/Robot, 5G/6G/IoT/Smart City, Biotech/Health, New Energy, Advanced Manufacturing, FinTech, Culture/Tourism, AgriTech/FoodTech, Green Tech, Smart Travel, Healthcare, General Tech
New Award + Investment mechanism: winners get priority co-investment from HICOOL partner VCs
Talent Scout Bonus for successful project referrals
Full-lifecycle support: residency, healthcare, exit/entry facilitation, incubation, product showcasing
titleCN: HICOOL 2026 全球创业者峰会暨创业大赛

title: 2026 Hangzhou Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition for Overseas Talent (GITP)
prize: Not disclosed — investor access + landing support + government connections
desc: Organized under GITP Asia. Designed to discover and empower overseas entrepreneurs entering China. 8 industry sectors. Attracted 12,000+ projects over 11 editions.
highlights: 8 sectors: AI & Pharma, IoT & Smart Hardware, Robotics & Automation, Smart Manufacturing, Automotive Tech, AgriTech, Food Technology, HealthTech & Biotech
Pitch to international investors & industry leaders
Government & VC connections, cross-border collaborations
Access to Hangzhou's innovation ecosystem and China market entry support
11 editions with 12,000+ projects, nearly 400 landed in Hangzhou
titleCN: 2026 杭州海外高层次人才创新创业大赛

title: 2026 'Startup in Shanghai' International Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition
prize: Shanghai Innovation Fund grants + 6 months free office + VC matchmaking
desc: 14th edition. Nearly 70,000 tech companies since 2012 — 94 have gone public. Three categories: Team, Startup Enterprise, Growth-Stage. Registration closed May 31.
highlights: 14 editions, nearly 70,000 participants, 94 IPOs since 2012
Three categories: Team (pre-registration), Startup Enterprise, Growth-Stage
Up to 6 months free office space for finalists
Priority access to partner bank loans, 100+ VC institutions
Full lifecycle support: workshops, accelerator camps, founder training
titleCN: 2026「创·在上海」国际创新创业大赛

title: 2026 'Win in Nanjing' Overseas Talent Entrepreneurship Competition
desc: Targets Nanjing's '4266' industrial system. 18 industry tracks. Three stages: Launch → Selection → Finals. Winners eligible for D-class talent benefits.
highlights: 18 tracks covering AI, IC, New Energy Vehicles, Biomedicine, Aerospace, Metaverse, Energy Storage & Hydrogen
36 winners across three prize tiers (¥50K / ¥30K / ¥20K)
D-class talent housing benefits for qualifying winners who settle in Nanjing
VC matching with professional investment institutions
Business plan revision and roadshow guidance included
titleCN: 2026「赢在南京」海外人才创业大赛

title: 2026 Guangdong Overseas Chinese Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition (AI+)
prize: Cash prizes + landing support + GBA ecosystem access
desc: Launched in Zhongshan, focused on AI + humanoid robotics. Open Innovation Challenge matches projects with industry needs for technical application scenarios.
highlights: Focus track: AI + Humanoid Robotics
Open Innovation Challenge: projects matched with real industry needs
Greater Bay Area (GBA) ecosystem access and landing support
Main competition + Open Innovation Challenge dual-track format
Precise project-to-industry matching for technical application scenarios
titleCN: 2026 广东「侨创赛」(AI+) 海外侨界创新创业大赛

title: 2026 Longquan Thermal Management Industry Innovation & Entrepreneurship Competition
titleCN: 2026龙泉热管理产业创新创业大赛
prize: Not disclosed — industry landing support + government incentives
desc: Focused on thermal management industry upgrade in Longquan. Three key directions: NEV thermal management, cross-domain thermal management applications, and thermal management core components & materials. Aiming to attract high-growth tech projects through competition-driven investment.
highlights: Thermal management focus
NEV + cross-domain applications
Industry chain integration
Government landing support
